title: Inventory Pets
description: Turn your inventory into a living, breathing world!
body:
# Inventory Pets

Turn your inventory into its own mini world! There are seven different, custom-made 'environments' that you inventory can turn into: forest, cherry grove, snowy taiga, desert, sea, end, and nether. The texture of your inventory and entities that spawn in your inventory will change depending on your environment, which is decided at random each time you open your inventory.

![Cherry Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5131157ba9494e290d115fb306f215172ab70696.png)

Additionally, each environment has a specific set of mobs that will spawn, and a different one will spawn each time you open your inventory.

## Features

- Seven different environments
- Support for nearly all vanilla mobs
- Multiloader support
- Client-sided
- Proven to work on servers
- Doesn't get in the way

## Issues

Sometimes, using low GUI scales can cause the entities in your inventory to behave wierdly. If possible, try and have your GUI scale at least 3, but if that's not possible we'll do our best to make it work across different scales.

As always, report any issues here: https://github.com/downloadableduck/inventory-pets

## Compatibility

This mod has been tested for compatibility with: 

- Fabric API 
- Sodium
- Ferritecore

And has been shown to work perfectly. Due to the way it is coded, this mod is **not** likely to cause issues with other mods. However, any resource pack that changes the inventory textures will be overriden by this mod.

## Requirements

None! 

Have fun with this mod :)
